error_signature: cached schema independently of the actual sheet
title: Google Sheets node caching schema causes issues
symptom: The Google Sheets node fails to refresh fields dynamically, leading to errors when the schema of the sheet changes.
applies_when: Dynamic sheetId passed as an argument
not_this_if: Schema of the sheet remains unchanged
root_cause: The Google Sheets node caches the schema during the workflow's build time instead of refreshing it at runtime. This leads to mismatches when the actual sheet structure changes, causing errors in workflows designed to handle multiple sheets with different schemas.
fix_steps: Downgrade the Google Sheets node to version 3
Test the workflow to ensure it functions correctly with the new version
agent_instruction: Downgrade the Google Sheets node to version 3 to resolve schema caching issues.
safety_notes: Downgrading may result in loss of some functionality.
